pegap 0.0.0.9000

    • Introduction to pegap

Score Vintage Year Diversification

vintage_diversification_score.Rd

Score Vintage Year Diversification

Usage

vintage_diversification_score(fund_names, vintage_years, committed_capital)

Arguments

fund_names

A character vector of fund names

vintage_years

A numeric vector of vintage years

committed_capital

A numeric vector of committed capital amounts (must be positive)

Value

A named list containing vintage_weights, HHI, effective_vintages, diversification_score (0-100), and a concentration flag

Examples

vintage_diversification_score(
  c("Fund A", "Fund B", "Fund C"),
  c(2018, 2019, 2018),
  c(10000000, 15000000, 5000000)
)
#> $vintage_weights
#> 2018 2019 
#>  0.5  0.5 
#> 
#> $HHI
#> [1] 0.5
#> 
#> $effective_vintages
#> [1] 2
#> 
#> $diversification_score
#> [1] 100
#> 
#> $flag
#> [1] "WARNING: High vintage concentration"
#>
